div.head:
No. 1552
Editorial Note
div.p: Telegram 401 from Jidda, March 18, not printed, reported that the Embassy had received a copy of the Saudi Arabian reply to the British memorandum on Buraimi, which had been handed to Pelham the previous evening. Telegram 402, March 18, not printed, transmitted the full text of the Saudi Arabian note to the British. (780.022/3–1854)
